case_title: THOMPSON BROOKS, INC. VS. KLEIN PLASTERING, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE OF PROPOSED JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62389186) FILED BY PETITIONER THOMPSON BROOKS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER THOMPSON BROOKS, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437(D). THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. COUNSEL TO SUBMIT AN AMENDED JUDGMENT. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (EMAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM) (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
MOTION TO AMEND Judgment To Correct Clerical Error Under Code Of Civil Procedure Section 437(D) And Notice Of Motion
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THOMPSON BROOKS, INC.'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO CORRECT CLERICAL ERROR UNDER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 437(D)

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. No opposition filed. Order signed. Counsel to submit an amended judgment. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com) (302/RBU)

Notice Of Hearing On Thompson Brooks, Inc. Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jul-27-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Jung, Esq. 510-834-4350 of Boornazian Jensen & Garthe for PETITIONER THOMPSON BROOKS, INC.
No Other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. A proof of service was submitted to the Court prior to the hearing. The Court having reviewed the pleadings vacates the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER THOMPSON BROOKS, INC.'s Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Granted. Order signed. (see scanned order for details)

Petitioner to submit a proposed form of Judgment that includes a cover letter, calculation of the interest and pages from the arbitration award.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR #8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
